upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na BABUpUkamigamipyAyivepAm' (pA॰8.4.34) iti sUtre prakamanam iti kASikAyAmudAharaRam tadidaM prapUrvo'sya prayogo vyavahAraM nAtipatatIti vedayati
'jyAyo BAgaDeyaM nikAmayamAnaH' (tE0 saM0 1522) nikAmayamAno'BIcCan mADyandinaM vA eza (somaH)
'nikAme nikAme naH parjanyo varzatu' (vA0 saM0 2222) yadA yadAsmABiH kAmyeta tadA tadetyuktaM Bavati
'teByo gAyatrIva vasuByo deveBya ekEkenAkzareRa kAmAn nikAmAn duhe' (jE0 brA0 130) niScitaH kAmo nikAmaH
'na ca kAmasampadamaBikAmayate' (ki0 1823) aBikAmayate kAmayate prArTayate aBirDAtvarTaM na viSinazwi
